zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Washington於1296年出生在英國藍卡爾維特費爾德時，他的父親Robert de Washington I31歲，母親Joan Strickland28歲。他於1312年與Agnes le Gentyl在英國藍卡爾卡福斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1348年在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Washington于1296年出生在英国藍卡爾維特費爾德时，他的父亲Robert de Washington I31岁，母亲Joan Strickland28岁。他于1312年与Agnes le Gentyl在英国藍卡爾卡福斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1348年在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Washington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Washington in Durham, possibly also from Washington in Sussex. The Durham placename derives from an Old English personal name Hwassa, Hwæssa + the Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. In North America, this surname is by far most common among African Americans (see 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Washington (or George Washington), adopted in honor of George Washington, the 1st president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in most cases probably for the same reason.

History: George Washington (1732–99), 1st president of the US (1789–97), was born at Bridges Creek, VA. His great-grandfather had emigrated from Dillicar in Westmorland in 1658. George Washington was a slaveowner, but he became troubled with the institution of slavery. Shortly before his death he decided that his slaves have to be freed after the death of his wife. — With the passage of time, the surname Washington has come to be borne by more African Americans (around 90% of all bearers) than English-Americans. A prominent example was the educator Booker T. Washington (1856–1915), born a slave in VA, who adopted his surname from his stepfather, Washington Ferguson.

variants.name: President
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word president, probably adopted as a surname in honor of one of the early presidents of the US (compare Washington and Jefferson ) or simply because of the importance of the presidential function.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Washington was born in 1296, in Tewitfield, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert de Washington I, was 31 and his mother, Joan Strickland, was 28. He married Agnes le Gentyl in 1312, in Carnforth, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1348, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Washington est né en 1296, à Tewitfield, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Washington I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Strickland, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agnes le Gentyl en 1312, à Carnforth, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1348, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Washington 1296 in Tewitfield, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Washington I 31 und seine Mutter Joan Strickland 28. Er hat 1312 in Carnforth, Lancashire, England Agnes le Gentyl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1348 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Kendal, Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Washington è nato il nel 1296 nel Tewitfield, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Washington I, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Strickland, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Agnes le Gentyl nel 1312, nel Carnforth, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1348, nel Kendal, Westmorland, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Washington(이)가 1296년 영국 랭카실르 튜이트필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Washington I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Strickland(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1312년 영국 랭카실르 카른포스에서 Agnes le Gentyl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1348년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Washington nasceu em 1296, em Tewitfield, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Washington I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Strickland, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes le Gentyl em 1312, em Carnforth, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1348, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Washington родился в 1296 г. в местности тюитфиелд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Washington I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Strickland, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes le Gentyl в 1312 г. в местности карнфорт, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1348 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Washington nació en 1296, en Tewitfield, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Washington I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Strickland, tenía 28 años. Murió aproximadamente 1348, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
